name: Pipeline-Starved
inclusion_criteria: Active sales team AND outbound posture accepted AND no documented pipeline tooling

name: Pipeline-Rich Slow-Closing
description: Companies with full pipeline but long cycle

name: Productisation-Seeking

name: Partner-Ready
inclusion_criteria: Same target buyer AND non-competing offer
